form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr3) over 2230m after showing early speed at this track beaten 30 m by Sister Patrick (2:51.70) in 3 LIFETIME WINS on April 4 at $7.90. Two runs back was well beaten after breaking at this track on March 28. Not keen.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Lickadee Split at this track over 1800m in a No NR on March 23 at $4. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.5 m finishing second behind Sister Patrick at this track over 2230m in a 3 LIFETIME WINS on April 4 at $8.20. Draws well so can be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 2070m at Gawler, at the bell was 3rd-8.6 beaten 6 m by Hayoak (2:36.60) in NR up to 59 on March 30 at $10. Two runs back raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by 2 m (FT Fr2) at this track (2:54.10) beating The Vicars Girl in NR 41 to 59 on March 21 at $3.90 at the bell was 3rd-5.8. Has a low draw and is a player.
